---
title: "Homemade Mayo"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Sauces and Condiments"]
---

**Ingredients:**

-   Neutral Oil

    -   Grapeseed

    -   Canola

    -   Etc.

-   2 Eggs (Yolk)

-   Garlic

-   Lemon Juice

-   Olive oil

-   **Optional:** Vinegar

**Directions:**

1.
